topics: WATER RESOURCES AND IRRIGATION REQUIREMENT Water Resources- Introduction to irrigation
land grading and levelling-estimation of earth work
Soil water plant relationship, soil water movement, infiltration
Determination of evapotranspiration-Crop water requirement, irrigation requirement, irrigation scheduling and irrigation efficiencies
Introduction to different types of irrigation

METHODS OF IRRIGATION AND COMMAND AREA DEVELOPMENT Surface and Subsurface methods of Irrigation-Design of lined and unlined canals-Silt theories- Kennedy’s and Lacey’s theories, Lining of water courses and field channels
Underground pipeline irrigation system design. Water conveyance -Water control and diversion structures
Command area -Concept, Components of CADP, Classification of canals- Alignment of canals
MICRO IRRIGATION AND SPRINKLER IRRIGATION Micro Irrigation, components -Drip, micro sprinkler, mist, fogger etc
Sprinkler irrigation, types of sprinkler irrigation systems
design of sprinkler irrigation system, layout selection. Performance evaluation of sprinkler irrigation system, uniformity coefficient and pattern efficiency
Determination of pump capacity from head and discharge, selection and installation of pumps
AGRICULTURAL DRAINAGE Agricultural drainage - Factors affecting drainage
Principles of flow through soils, Darcy’s law

Surface drainage systems - Subsurface drainage - Design of subsurface drainage -Steady state equations- Pipe materials - mole drains, drainage wells, Leaching requirements - irrigation and drainage water quality. Suggestion on Project Topics
